科技.title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026
科技.summary: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.

科技.title: How to use Google’s new AI agents to go beyond your standard searches
科技.summary: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.

科技.title: Discord enables end-to-end encrypted voice and video calling for every user
科技.summary: Good news! Discord's hundreds of millions of users now have their communications scrambled, so not even Discord can see them.

科技.title: Mach Industries just spent $50M to solve a major defense tech problem
科技.summary: Mach says the acquisition meaningfully improves unit economics across its five vehicle programs at exactly the moment the company is starting to scale.

科技.title: From teen hacker to Iron Dome researcher, this founder raised $28M to fight AI phishing
科技.summary: Ocean, an agentic email security platform, claims its AI can thoroughly analyze the context of every incoming email to detect fraud and impersonation attempts.

科技.title: Elon Musk said Sam Altman ‘stole’ a non-profit — but the trial showed he had similar aims
科技.summary: The jury's speedy decision to reject Elon Musk's lawsuit against the other founders of OpenAI and Microsoft confirmed what we saw in the courtroom: Musk's case was a weak one, in part because he waited so long to file it.

科技.title: Google takes a page out of Meta’s book, announces new audio-powered smart glasses at IO 2026
科技.summary: Google is calling the new devices "audio glasses," in that users will be able to issue verbal commands to them and get things done via its ecosystem of apps and services, including Gemini.

科技.title: Google’s Genie world model can now simulate real streets with Street View
科技.summary: Google DeepMind is integrating Street View with Project Genie to create immersive, interactive world simulations for robotics, gaming, and travel, allowing users to explore environments, weather changes, and rare scenarios.

科技.title: With Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google bets its next AI wave on agents, not chatbots
科技.summary: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference. It is capable of autonomously executing complex tasks and building software from scratch.

科技.title: Google Search as you know it is over
科技.summary: Google is transforming Search from a list of links into an AI-powered experience filled with conversational answers, autonomous agents, and interactive interfaces — a shift that could further reduce traffic to publishers across the web.

科技.title: Google’s AI Studio now lets anyone build Android apps in minutes
科技.summary: Google unveiled new web-based AI tools that can generate native Android apps in minutes, as the company expands its push into AI-powered software development.

科技.title: Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude at IO 2026
科技.summary: The updates signal Google’s push to turn its Gemini app into an all-purpose AI hub rather than a stand-alone chatbot.

科技.title: Agentic app coding gets an upgrade with Google’s release of Android CLI
科技.summary: Google is embracing the rise of AI coding agents with new Android tools designed to work with platforms like Claude Code and OpenAI’s Codex, allowing developers — or their AI assistants — to build Android apps faster from the command line.

科技.title: Google’s new Universal Cart wants to follow your entire shopping journey across the internet
科技.summary: Most people shop across multiple devices, many retailers, and over the course of many days, which is why Google is launching Universal Cart.
